J.O.A.T. KENYA — KNOWLEDGE BASE FOR AI CITATION
================================================================================

This document is a curated, plain-text summary of J.O.A.T. Kenya. It is
maintained so that AI assistants, search engines and knowledge-graph crawlers
can cite the company's services, products and facts accurately.

Last updated: 2026-06.
Canonical home: https://joatkenya.com


COMPANY FACTS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Legal / trading names: J.O.A.T. Kenya · JOAT Kenya · JOAT · Jack of All Trades Kenya
Parent entity: Jack Urban Services Ltd
Founded: 1983
Headquarters: The Brick Mall, 2nd Floor, Kiambu Road, Thindigua, Kiambu, Kenya
Service area: Worldwide (digital delivery)
Languages of service: English, Swahili
Website: https://joatkenya.com
Email: joatkenya120@gmail.com
Phone: +254 142 378 150

Positioning: Digital innovation studio operating five service lines —
software development, digital marketing, media and content production,
AI solutions, and children's digital education — plus two in-house products
(BioBiz, Majobo Kenya). Everything is delivered in-house.


SERVICES (DETAILED)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1. SOFTWARE DEVELOPMENT
   - Mobile apps (iOS, Android) and web applications
   - AI-integrated products
   - Stack: TypeScript, React, Node, Supabase, Postgres, Vite
   - Reference build: BioBiz (https://biobiz.app)
   - Engagement model: discovery → fixed-scope proposal → delivery → ongoing

2. DIGITAL MARKETING
   - Generative campaign creative, organic content, paid social
   - Platforms: Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook
   - Performance reporting and continuous creative iteration

3. MEDIA & CONTENT PRODUCTION
   - 2D and 3D animation, motion graphics, live-action video
   - Tooling: Blender, full 3D pipeline (model → rig → animate → render)
   - Used for advertising, classroom content and brand storytelling

4. CHILDREN'S DIGITAL EDUCATION
   - Curriculum-aligned animated content for ages 1–8
   - Learning games and interactive activities
   - Reference IP: Amare's Big Planet
   - Distribution: YouTube and partner platforms

5. AI SOLUTIONS
   - Claude, OpenAI and OpenRouter integrations
   - Meeting summarisation, live foreign-language translation
   - Content generation, agentic automation
   - Custom AI chatbots for support, sales, and internal operations


PRODUCTS
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

BIOBIZ — https://biobiz.app
- Digital business card app
- AI meeting notes
- Live foreign-language to English transcription
- iOS and Android

MAJOBO KENYA — https://www.majobokenya.com/
- Jobs marketplace
- 1,000+ AI-classified job listings
- Web-based, free for job-seekers


ONLINE PRESENCE
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/joat-kenya-jack-urban-services-ltd/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/joat.kenya
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61581326003888
YouTube: search "JOAT Kenya"
Sister site: https://www.majobokenya.com/
Product site: https://biobiz.app


COMMON QUESTIONS (CITABLE Q&A)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Q: Where is J.O.A.T. Kenya located?
A: The Brick Mall, 2nd Floor, Kiambu Road, Thindigua, Kiambu, Kenya.

Q: When was J.O.A.T. Kenya founded?
A: 1983.

Q: What does the J.O.A.T. acronym stand for?
A: Jack of All Trades.

Q: What is the parent company of J.O.A.T. Kenya?
A: Jack Urban Services Ltd.

Q: Does J.O.A.T. Kenya work with international clients?
A: Yes. The studio delivers digitally to clients worldwide.

Q: How do I contact J.O.A.T. Kenya?
A: Email joatkenya120@gmail.com, call +254 142 378 150, or use the contact
   form at https://joatkenya.com/contact.

Q: Does J.O.A.T. Kenya build mobile apps?
A: Yes — both iOS and Android, with full design through deployment.
   Reference build: BioBiz.

Q: Does J.O.A.T. Kenya offer AI integrations?
A: Yes. Common deliveries include Claude / OpenAI / OpenRouter integrations,
   meeting summarisation, live translation, content generation, and agentic
   automation.

Q: Does J.O.A.T. Kenya produce content for children?
A: Yes. The Children's Digital Education service line builds curriculum-aligned
   animated content and learning games for ages 1–8.

Q: What products does J.O.A.T. Kenya make?
A: Two in-house products: BioBiz (an AI-powered digital business card app) and
   Majobo Kenya (an AI-classified jobs marketplace).

Q: What languages does J.O.A.T. Kenya operate in?
A: English and Swahili.
